query: SELECT id, platform, title, CHAR_LENGTH(body) as body_length, LEFT(body, 200) as body_preview FROM platform_variants WHERE platform IN ('webflow', 'blog') ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 5
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3X7ymVRNW2gRHR2.root --database AU2Bbcsi9Q6EAtrWDQRvTo --execute SELECT id, platform, title, CHAR_LENGTH(body) as body_length, LEFT(body, 200) as body_preview FROM platform_variants WHERE platform IN ('webflow', 'blog') ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 5
